message:
feat(bubbletea-macros): Add comprehensive error messages for derive macro (charmed_rust-31d)

- Rewrite MacroError enum with 7 error variants: Parse, MissingMethod,
  DuplicateMethod, WrongSignature, UnsupportedItem, InvalidAttribute,
  InvalidStateField, and MissingBounds
- Add help messages with code examples for each error type
- Add ErrorAccumulator pattern for collecting multiple errors
- Add validation to reject enums, unions, tuple structs, and unit structs
- Add trybuild UI tests for all unsupported item types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,6 +19,7 @@ proc-macro-error2 = "2.0"
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 trybuild = "1.0"
+bubbletea = { path = "../bubbletea", features = ["macros"] }
 
 [lints]
 workspace = true

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+error: #[derive(Model)] can only be applied to a struct, found enum
+
+       help: Apply #[derive(Model)] to a struct instead.
+ --> tests/ui/fail/enum_not_supported.rs:6:6
+  |
+6 | enum NotAStruct {
+  |      ^^^^^^^^^^

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+error: #[derive(Model)] can only be applied to a named struct with fields, found tuple struct
+
+       help: Apply #[derive(Model)] to a named struct with fields instead.
+ --> tests/ui/fail/tuple_struct_not_supported.rs:6:8
+  |
+6 | struct TupleStruct(i32, String);
+  |        ^^^^^^^^^^^

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+error: #[derive(Model)] can only be applied to a struct, found union
+
+       help: Apply #[derive(Model)] to a struct instead.
+ --> tests/ui/fail/union_not_supported.rs:6:7
+  |
+6 | union NotAStruct {
+  |       ^^^^^^^^^^

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+error: #[derive(Model)] can only be applied to a named struct with fields, found unit struct
+
+       help: Apply #[derive(Model)] to a named struct with fields instead.
+ --> tests/ui/fail/unit_struct_not_supported.rs:6:8
+  |
+6 | struct UnitStruct;
+  |        ^^^^^^^^^^
